rent.note: furnished 1BR in nomad area; center avg ~€1,300-1,500 ($1,566-1,800); Utrecht cheaper than Amsterdam

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; Netherlands energy costs moderate; internet ~€35

diningOut.note: Utrecht dining €15-30/meal; good cafe culture; slightly cheaper than Amsterdam

transit.note: OV-chipkaart monthly ~€95; excellent train connections to Amsterdam (25 min)

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly €200-500; mid ~€230; Utrecht growing nomad scene

misc.note: gym (~€30), toiletries, entertainment, cycling costs, buffer

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Utrecht medium-term furnished lets are stable year-round.

evidence.quote: a single person costs $2,850 per month, and cost of living from $2,720/mo
average monthly rent for a one-bedroom apartment in Utrecht is around €1,300-€1,500 (approximately $1,566-$1,800 USD); city center avg $2,025/month
Eating out in Utrecht can range from €15-€30 per meal, while groceries can cost around €50-€75 per week for basic items
Coworking spaces in Utrecht typically charge around €200-€500 per month for a hot desk
